entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary crop studied for panicle morphology and yield.

entities.name: PANICLE MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: A trait important for racial classification and grain yield in sorghum.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic trait determined by panicle morphology.

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: The genomic method used to identify loci for panicle traits.

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: A specific panicle morphology trait measured in the study.

entities.description: A specific panicle morphology trait measured in the study.

entities.name: PANICLE COMPACTNESS
entities.description: A specific panicle morphology trait measured in the study.

entities.name: PEDUNCLE RECURVING
entities.description: A specific panicle morphology trait measured in the study.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for association mapping.

entities.name: SORGHUM MINI CORE PANEL
entities.description: The specific set of sorghum genotypes used for the study.

entities.name: MULTIPLE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The diverse environmental conditions where traits were measured.

entities.name: PM 2-1
entities.description: A locus on chromosome 2 identified through association mapping.

entities.name: PM 2-2
entities.description: A locus on chromosome 2 colocalized with panicle compactness.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop used for ortholog comparison of the EP2 gene.

entities.name: EP2
entities.description: The Erect Panicle2 gene that regulates panicle erectness and length in rice.

entities.name: PANICLE ERECTNESS
entities.description: A trait in rice regulated by the EP2 gene.

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: A trait to be enhanced in sorghum through molecular identification of genes.
